sentences.target: Tu ornes le sapin avec des guirlandes.
sentences.reading: /ty ɔʁn lə sapɛ̃ avɛk de ɡiʁlɑ̃d/

translations.fr: Tu ornes le sapin avec des guirlandes.
translations.ipa: /ty ɔʁn lə sapɛ̃ avɛk de ɡiʁlɑ̃d/
translations.en: You decorate the Christmas tree with garlands.
translations.es: Decoras el árbol de Navidad con guirnaldas.
translations.de: Du schmückst den Weihnachtsbaum mit Girlanden.
translations.it: Decori l'albero di Natale con ghirlande.
translations.pt: Você decora a árvore de Natal com guirlandas.
translations.he: אתה מקשט את עץ חג המולד בשרשראות.
translations.vi: Bạn trang trí cây thông Noel bằng dây trang trí.
translations.ar: أنت تزيّن شجرة عيد الميلاد بسلاسل الزينة.
translations.nl: Je versiert de kerstboom met slingers.
translations.hi: तुम मालाओं से क्रिसमस ट्री सजाते हो.
translations.el: Στολίζεις το χριστουγεννιάτικο δέντρο με γιρλάντες.
translations.id: Kamu menghias pohon Natal dengan untaian hias.
translations.ro: Împodobești bradul de Crăciun cu ghirlande.
translations.ja: クリスマスツリーをガーランドで飾る。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, selecting the direct object 'le sapin' and the prepositional phrase 'avec des guirlandes'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun 'sapin'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'ornes'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of 'guirlandes'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: J'orne la table avec quelques fleurs.

translations.fr: J'orne la table avec quelques fleurs.
translations.en: I decorate the table with some flowers.
translations.es: Decoro la mesa con algunas flores.
translations.de: Ich schmücke den Tisch mit ein paar Blumen.
translations.it: Decoro il tavolo con qualche fiore.
translations.ko: 나는 테이블을 몇 송이 꽃으로 장식해요.
translations.pt: Eu decoro a mesa com algumas flores.
translations.he: אני מקשט את השולחן בכמה פרחים.
translations.vi: Tôi trang trí bàn bằng vài bông hoa.
translations.nl: Ik versier de tafel met enkele bloemen.
translations.hi: मैं कुछ फूलों से मेज़ सजाता हूँ.
translations.el: Στολίζω το τραπέζι με μερικά λουλούδια.
translations.nb: Jeg pynter bordet med noen blomster.
translations.id: Aku menghias meja dengan beberapa bunga.
translations.sv: Jag pyntar bordet med några blommor.
translations.da: Jeg pynter bordet med nogle blomster.
translations.ja: 私はテーブルをいくつかの花で飾ります。

tokens.explanation: Clitic personal subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular; subject of 'orne'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking direct object 'la table' and the PP 'avec quelques fleurs'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'orne'.
Preposition introducing a means/instrument PP.
Quantifier determiner; modifies 'fleurs' to indicate a small number.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: On orne la porte avec une couronne.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɔʁn la pɔʁt avɛk yn kuʁɔn/

translations.fr: On orne la porte avec une couronne.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɔʁn la pɔʁt avɛk yn kuʁɔn/
translations.en: We decorate the door with a wreath.
translations.es: Decoramos la puerta con una corona.
translations.de: Wir schmücken die Tür mit einem Kranz.
translations.it: Decoriamo la porta con una ghirlanda.
translations.pt: Nós decoramos a porta com uma guirlanda.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi trang trí cánh cửa bằng một vòng hoa.
translations.nl: We versieren de deur met een krans.
translations.hi: हम दरवाज़ा एक माला से सजाते हैं.
translations.el: Στολίζουμε την πόρτα με ένα στεφάνι.
translations.nb: Vi pynter døren med en krans.
translations.id: Kami menghias pintu dengan sebuah karangan bunga.
translations.sv: Vi pyntar dörren med μια krans.
translations.da: Vi pynter døren med en krans.
translations.ja: 私たちはドアをリースで飾ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal personal pronoun used with 3rd person singular agreement; subject of 'orne'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting 'la porte' and the PP 'avec une couronne'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'orne'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'couronne'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Je veux orner le salon pour Noël.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø ɔʁne lə salɔ̃ puʁ nɔɛl/

translations.fr: Je veux orner le salon pour Noël.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø ɔʁne lə salɔ̃ puʁ nɔɛl/
translations.en: I want to decorate the living room for Christmas.
translations.es: Quiero decorar la sala para Navidad.
translations.de: Ich will das Wohnzimmer für Weihnachten schmücken.
translations.it: Voglio decorare il soggiorno per Natale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想为圣诞节装饰客厅。
translations.ru: Я хочу украсить гостиную к Рождеству.
translations.pt: Quero decorar a sala para o Natal.
translations.he: אני רוצה לקשט את הסלון לחג המולד.
translations.tr: Noel için oturma odasını süslemek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn trang trí phòng khách cho Giáng Sinh.
translations.ar: أريد أن أزيّن غرفة الجلوس لعيد الميلاد.
translations.nl: Ik wil de woonkamer versieren voor Kerstmis.
translations.uk: Я хочу прикрасити вітальню до Різдва.
translations.hi: मैं क्रिसमस के लिए बैठक कक्ष सजाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę udekorować salon na Boże Narodzenie.
translations.el: Θέλω να στολίσω το σαλόνι για τα Χριστούγεννα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil pynte stua til jul.
translations.id: Saya ingin mendekorasi ruang tamu untuk Natal.
translations.sv: Jag vill pynta vardagsrummet till jul.
translations.ro: Vreau să decorez livingul pentru Crăciun.
translations.cs: Chci vyzdobit obývací pokoj na Vánoce.
translations.da: Jeg vil pynte stuen til jul.
translations.ja: クリスマスのためにリビングを飾りたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'veux'.
Modal verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; selects the infinitive complement 'orner'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veux', heading a non-finite clause.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'orner'.
Preposition indicating purpose; introduces 'Noël'.
Proper noun (holiday name); object of the preposition 'pour'.
